title: Vegan Crunchy Filipino Steak Stir-fry
description: A spicy and dense adventure in Filipino cuisine featuring a vegan-friendly twist on the classic steak stir-fry, packed with flavor.

ingredients.name: Olive oil or vegan mayo for breading
Spices (ground)
ingredients.notes: such as cumin, coriander seeds, black pepper

instructions: Slice the vegan steak into bite-sized pieces.
Mix spices with olive oil and coat the slices evenly. Allow them to marinate for at least 30 minutes if possible.
Heat a wok or skillet over medium-high heat, add sliced onion and garlic, stir-fry until translucent.
Add finely chopped celery and bell peppers, stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Place the seasoned vegan steak into the pan and cook on each side for about 5 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the vegan steak from the wok and set aside. Add bok choy to the pan with a little bit of ketchup and soy sauce, stir-fry until tender.
Add more ketchup and soy sauce if needed to adjust the spice level and create the desired consistency for a spicy blend.
Return the vegan steak back into the wok and combine all vegetables. Stir-fry everything together, adjusting seasoning as necessary.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
